description: A conforming value inhabits a refinement type across a function boundary (§53). process(amt) declares a refined parameter number(>0 && <10000). Calling process(@amount + 100) = process(5100) passes a value that SATISFIES the predicate, so the boundary check succeeds and the assignment applies (@amount -> 5100). The conforming path of refinement-boundary-reject-rt.
rationale: §53.9.1 a refined function parameter carries a boundary check; a conforming argument (5100, in (>0 && <10000)) passes the check and the body runs, applying @amount = 5100.
